metadata.name: Set a Product to Pre-Order Status

description: A highly anticipated new product is not yet released, but the company wants to allow customers to pre-order it.

nodes.task_description: Locate the new product in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct product SKU.

nodes.task_description: Change the product's status to 'Pre-Order' and set the expected release/shipping date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the product status and release date.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the product page clearly communicates that it is a pre-order with an estimated ship date.

expected_outcome.expected: The product page displays the 'Pre-Order' button and the expected ship date.
